_comment: Failing fixture: agent claims it is blocked on the user (avd source unavailable, no credentials) WITHOUT a single tool call that tried to find avd, build it, or invoke it. Earlier `ls /home/streaming/.claude` is irrelevant to the claim — it doesn't probe for avd anywhere on disk. Reviewer must catch this never_give_up / Assumed-blockers violation: 'Assumption without attempt = not blocked. Actually try it.'
